info.title: Travel Agency API
info.description: Sprint 2 — Auth, Tours, Bookings, and Tour Booking Lifecycle Management. Includes JWT-based authentication, tour browsing, booking lifecycle (BOOKED → CONFIRMED → STARTED → FINISHED / CANCELED), document upload & verification, and travel-agent dedicated endpoints.

tags.name: Tours
tags.description: Destination search, tour listing, details and reviews

tags.name: Travel Agent
tags.description: Endpoints for travel agents to manage their assigned bookings

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Sign-up, sign-in, token refresh and logout

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Tour booking lifecycle: create, confirm, cancel, upload/verify documents, record customer approval

tags.name: Travel Agent
tags.description: Travel-agent portal: list and manage assigned bookings

put.description: Updates booking details such as meal plan, traveler info and guest count

400.description: Invalid request data or booking state

delete.description: Allowed only if current date is at least 10 days before tour start date

get.summary: Get all bookings for a user

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user whose bookings to retrieve

post.summary: Upload a document to a booking
post.description: Customer uploads a passport, visa, or payment receipt for the assigned travel agent to review

post.summary: Confirm booking with document check (travel agent, Sprint 2)
post.description: Transitions BOOKED → CONFIRMED after verifying all uploaded documents

patch.description: Transitions a booking from BOOKED to CONFIRMED state (no document check)

400.description: Booking is not in BOOKED state

post.summary: Sign in with email and password
Refresh access token using refresh token cookie

patch.description: Edits guests, meal plan, or duration — only allowed before confirmation and after customer approval

400.description: Edit not allowed (post-confirmation or no approval)

patch.description: Travel agent approves or rejects a specific document uploaded by the customer

400.description: Invalid action or document not found

patch.summary: Record customer approval for agent edit
patch.description: Records whether the customer approved or declined the travel agent's proposed changes (OFFLINE mode)

get.summary: List bookings assigned to the calling travel agent
get.description: Returns all bookings where the JWT subject matches the booking's travelAgentId. Optionally filter by booking status (BOOKED, CONFIRMED, STARTED, FINISHED, CANCELED).

get.summary: Get a single booking assigned to the calling travel agent
get.description: Returns full booking detail including customer info, documents, and lifecycle metadata. Returns 401 if the calling agent is not the one assigned to this booking.

get.summary: Get reviews for a specific tour
Get paginated list of available tours with filters

delete.summary: Cancel booking with reason (travel agent, Sprint 2)
delete.description: Cancels a BOOKED or CONFIRMED booking with a structured reason and refund eligibility

400.description: Invalid reason or booking cannot be cancelled

UploadDocumentRequestDTO.description: Request to upload a document to a booking

CustomerApprovalDTO.description: Customer approval record for travel-agent proposed edits

CustomerDetailsDTO.description: Customer contact info visible to assigned travel agent

TravelAgentBookingDetailDTO.description: Full booking detail returned to the assigned travel agent

notes.description: Optional notes from the travel agent

ConfirmBookingRequestDTO.description: Request to confirm a booking (travel agent action)

EditBookingRequestDTO.description: Request for a travel agent to edit a booking (requires prior customer approval)

documentId.description: ID of the document within the booking's documents list

note.description: Optional note explaining the verification decision

DocumentVerificationRequestDTO.description: Request to verify (or reject) a specific booking document

approvalGiven.description: Whether the customer approved the changes

approvalNote.description: Optional customer note about the approval decision

CustomerApprovalRequestDTO.description: Customer approval for travel agent proposed booking changes

AgentBookingListResponseDTO.description: List of bookings assigned to a travel agent

BookedTourDTO.description: Booked tour summary for customer and agent views

reasonNote.description: Additional detail about the cancellation reason

CancelBookingRequestDTO.description: Request to cancel a booking (travel agent action)

Bearer.description: Paste your JWT access token here
